title: muhlenbergia × angustata
intro: Muhlenbergia × angustata, also known as Muhly Grass, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Muhlenbergia × angustata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
